assertions.description: In all sub-schematics (vco, vclpf, lfo, etc.), B+ and B- carry the analog supply rails but are classified only as 'signal' in net_classification. There are no power symbols for them (they use hierarchical labels instead), so power_rails in statistics is empty for these sheets. The analyzer correctly picks up GND via the power:GND symbol but misses the positive and negative supply nets entirely, leaving IC power rail analysis incomplete for the LM324 and other ICs.
